title: UnstableSMP farlands
description: This project adds the farlands from the unstable smp into your minecraft server! Normal farlands, sand farlands, void lands and more!
body:
This minecraft 1.21+ plugin adds the farlands to modern versions of the game

This plugin is based off of wemmbu,s series in the minecraft farlands and the custom biomes that generate in the farlands

### Check the Gallery for images of the farlands
### 
Custom farland biomes:

Normal farlands:
Generates 12550821 blocks out

Sand farlands generates 14000000 blocks out

Corrupt farlands generates 16000000 blocks out

Valley farlands generates 18000000 blocks out

Cherry Valley farlands generates 20000000 blocks out

Hills farlands generates 22000000 blocks out

Island farlands generates 24000000 blocks out

Ice Spikes farlands generates 26000000 blocks out

One block farlands generates 28000000 blocks out

Void farlands generates 29000000 blocks out



## **Config:**
```
farlands:
  distance: 12550821
  coordinate-scale: 684.412
  height-scale: 684.412
  sea-level: 63
  max-height: 210
  no-bedrock: true

  # ── Zone 1: Sand Farlands (14M) ───────────────────────────────────────────
  sand-zone:
    enabled: true
    start-distance: 14000000

  # ── Zone 2: Broken Farlands (16M) ─────────────────────────────────────────
  broken-zone:
    enabled: true
    start-distance: 16000000
    missing-chunk-chance: 0.35

  # ── Zone 3: Flower Meadow Plains (18M) ────────────────────────────────────
  plains-zone:
    enabled: true
    start-distance: 18000000
    surface-y: 64
    mineshaft-y: 111
    flower-attempts: 15

  # ── Zone 4: Cherry Blossom Meadow (20M) ───────────────────────────────────
  cherry-zone:
    enabled: true
    start-distance: 20000000

  # ── Zone 5: Giant Mountains (22M) ─────────────────────────────────────────
  mountain-zone:
    enabled: true
    start-distance: 22000000

  # ── Zone 6: Flying Islands (24M) ──────────────────────────────────────────
  island-zone:
    enabled: true
    start-distance: 24000000

  # ── Zone 7: Snow Spikes (26M) ─────────────────────────────────────────────
  snow-zone:
    enabled: true
    start-distance: 26000000

  # ── Zone 8: Scattered Blocks (28M) ────────────────────────────────────────
  scatter-zone:
    enabled: true
    start-distance: 28000000

  # ── Zone 9: True Void (29M–34M) ───────────────────────────────────────────
  void-zone:
    enabled: true
    start-distance: 29000000

```
